summary: Short blog post praising Cavalier Equestrian of Stratford, Ontario, as Cavallo's Canadian hoof-boot distributor for their customer service and product knowledge.
Customer testimonial from a rider recounting a wet, river-crossing trail ride at Deer Creek Preserve where Cavallo hoof boots stayed on through mud and water.
Story about Dream Riders, a NARHA therapeutic riding center, using a donated set of Cavallo hoof boots on Chucky, a 25-year-old foundered racking horse.
Recap of the Cavallo team's visit to the Cavalia equestrian show, reflecting on the performance and the benefit of hoof boots for hard-working show horses.
Announcement of Carole Herder's Equine Affaire Ohio talk on turning a horse passion into a business, plus a bio of the Cavallo founder and her inventions.
Announcement of Carole Herder's Equine Affaire talk comparing metal shoes, hoof boots, and barefoot, covering hoof functions and proper hoof care.
Carole Herder reviews Dutch Henry's novel 'We'll Have the Summer,' noting the author uses Cavallo saddle pads and hoof boots.
Lighthearted post from Carole Herder explaining the nicknames of the Cavallo team and factory partners during a week in Southern China.
Event announcement for a Doug Mills horse-training demo at Buckerfields in Abbotsford, BC, with Cavallo saddle pad and cooler-chair prize draws.
Travel post about meeting Cavallo customers and a California store rep, touting hoof-boot features and Cavallo's role as Official Hoof Boot of ACTHA.
Brief post framing the 'barefoot battle' over horse hoof care, linking to a comedic YouTube video for comic relief.
Customer testimonial from Lois in Idaho describing four years of using the Simple Hoof Boot on barefoot horses across rough Teton mountain terrain.
